hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
fp = data.get('file_path', '') or data.get('path', '')
if re.search(r'\.env(\.[^/]*)?\.local$', fp):
    print('BLOCKED: Edits to .env*.local files are prohibited — credential leak prevention.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
fp = data.get('file_path', '') or data.get('path', '')
if re.search(r'supabase/migrations/.*\.sql$', fp) and os.path.isfile(fp):
    print('BLOCKED: Editing an existing migration is prohibited — create a new numbered migration file instead.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"
